role_summary: the government auditor examines public acc ounts to ensure proper utilization of  government funds and compliance with financial rules and regulations.
responsibilities: • conduct audits of government departments and public bodies   • verify expenditure against sanctioned budgets and grants   • ensure com pliance with government financial rules and manuals   • identify irregularities, inefficiencies, and misuse of funds   • prepare audit reports and observations for authorities   • support legislative and parliamentary audit processes
qualifications: • qualified  chartered accountant   • strong knowledge of government accounting and audit procedures   • high integrity and attention to detail
